diagrams.title: Procurement Lifecycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows the sequential stages from identifying requirements to ongoing vendor management
diagrams.purpose: Helps visualize the complete procurement journey and understand each stage's role

diagrams.title: TCO Iceberg Model
diagrams.description: Hidden costs of IT procurement visualized as an iceberg
elements: Visible costs above water: Purchase price, Installation, Initial training
Hidden costs below water: Maintenance, Upgrades, Support contracts, Energy, Cooling, Downtime, Staff time, Data management, Disposal
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrates that purchase price is often a small fraction of true cost

diagrams.title: Procurement Models Comparison Matrix
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison of Purchase, Lease, and Rental/Cloud models
elements: Purchase: CAPEX, High upfront, Full ownership, Long-term commitment
Lease: Mixed, Medium upfront, Option to own, Medium-term
Rental/Cloud: OPEX, Low upfront, No ownership, Flexible, Scalable
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for choosing appropriate procurement model

diagrams.title: Vendor Selection Criteria Weights
diagrams.description: Pie chart showing typical weighted criteria for vendor evaluation
diagrams.purpose: Shows relative importance of different vendor evaluation factors
